# bmco

Bayesian methods for comparing groups on multiple binary outcomes.

## Installation

``` r
# From CRAN (when accepted)
install.packages("bmco")

# Development version
# devtools::install_github("XynthiaKavelaars/bmco")
```

## Quick Example

``` r
library(bmco)

# Generate data
set.seed(123)
data <- data.frame(
  treatment = rep(c("control", "drug"), each = 50),
  outcome1 = rbinom(100, 1, 0.5),
  outcome2 = rbinom(100, 1, 0.5)
)

# Analyze
result <- bmvb(
  data = data,
  grp = "treatment",
  grp_a = "control",
  grp_b = "drug",
  y_vars = c("outcome1", "outcome2"),
  n_it = 10000
)

print(result)
```

## Functions

- [`bmvb()`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/bmvb.md):
  Basic group comparison
- [`bglm()`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/bglm.md):
  Subgroup analysis  
- [`bglmm()`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/bglmm.md):
  Multilevel data

## Getting Help

See
[`vignette("introduction")`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/articles/introduction.md)
for detailed examples.

## Acknowledgements

The statistical underpinnings of this package were developed with
financial support of a NWO (Dutch Research Council) research talent
grant (no. 406.18.505) and the theoretical insights of Maurits Kaptein
(Eindhoven University of Technology, The Netherlands) and Joris Mulder
(Tilburg University, The Netherlands).

# Package index

## All functions

- [`bglm()`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/bglm.md)
  : Bayesian Generalized Linear Model
- [`bglmm()`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/bglmm.md)
  : Bayesian Generalized Linear Mixed Model
- [`bglmm_data`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/bglmm_data.md)
  : Simulated Multilevel Clinical Trial Data
- [`bglmm_fit`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/bglmm_fit.md)
  : Pre-computed bglmm Example Fit
- [`bglm_data`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/bglm_data.md)
  : Simulated Single-Level Clinical Trial Data
- [`bglm_fit`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/bglm_fit.md)
  : Pre-computed bglm Example Fit
- [`bmco`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/bmco-package.md)
  [`bmco-package`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/bmco-package.md)
  : bmco: Bayesian Analysis for Multivariate Categorical Outcomes
- [`bmvb()`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/bmvb.md)
  : Bayesian Multivariate Bernoulli Test
- [`plot(`*`<bglm>`*`)`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/plot.bglm.md)
  : Plot Method for bglm Objects
- [`plot(`*`<bglmm>`*`)`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/plot.bglmm.md)
  : Plot Method for bglmm Objects
- [`print(`*`<bglm>`*`)`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/print.bglm.md)
  : Print Method for bglm Objects
- [`print(`*`<bglmm>`*`)`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/print.bglmm.md)
  : Print Method for bglmm Objects
- [`print(`*`<bmvb>`*`)`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/print.bmvb.md)
  : Print Method for bmvb Objects
- [`print(`*`<summary.bglm>`*`)`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/print.summary.bglm.md)
  : Print Method for summary.bglm Objects
- [`print(`*`<summary.bglmm>`*`)`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/print.summary.bglmm.md)
  : Print Method for summary.bglmm Objects
- [`print(`*`<summary.bmvb>`*`)`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/print.summary.bmvb.md)
  : Print Method for summary.bmvb Objects
- [`summary(`*`<bglm>`*`)`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/summary.bglm.md)
  : Summary Method for bglm Objects
- [`summary(`*`<bglmm>`*`)`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/summary.bglmm.md)
  : Summary Method for bglmm Objects
- [`summary(`*`<bmvb>`*`)`](https://xynthiakavelaars.github.io/bmco/reference/summary.bmvb.md)
  : Summary Method for bmvb Objects
